title: Berry Cassoulet French Toast
description: A sweet twist on the classic cassoulet, featuring roasted berries and crispy French toast.

ingredients.name: Roasted berries
ingredients.notes: such as strawberries, blueberries, or raspberries

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.notes: whole milk or a non-dairy milk alternative

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
In a shallow dish, whisk together eggs, milk, cinnamon, and sugar (if using).
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Dip each bread slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the bread slices in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve the French toast warm with roasted berries and a side of French cassoulet.
Optional: top with additional roasted berries, whipped cream, or maple syrup.
